Goal2020.purpose: keep polygon AABB extent payload device-resident on the CuPy path

Goal2022.purpose: add a generic compressed repeated metric-table continuation pattern for graph analytics

allowed_claims: Python + RTDL + partner tensor continuation is demonstrated across the current app matrix
current 16-row evidence matrix has no remaining negative row in its measured or bounded contract
CuPy and Torch are useful continuation partners for reducing, filtering, ranking, grouping, and summarizing generic RTDL outputs
blocked_claims: whole-app speedup is authorized for every app
broad RT-core acceleration is authorized for every workload
bounded rows can be marketed as broad domain solver claims
next_steps: produce final v2.0 release matrix after Goal2022
refresh front-page, tutorial, examples, and claim-boundary docs
wait for explicit user release action
